interpretation_notes: Inclusive annotation duration is CPU wall time for the profiler range; kernel_time_sum_ms is the sum of GPU kernel events whose start timestamp falls inside that annotation range.
Kernel sums can double-count across nested annotations and can exceed wall time when kernels overlap; use inclusive_ms for latency envelopes and kernel_time_sum_ms to detect math/launch/wait balance.
The dense linear owner tags are profiling-only and perturb the original autograd graph, but they identify which selected Linear modules were formerly hidden inside MmBackward0.
MBS=1 with GBS=64 on 4 GPUs gives 16 fwd/bwd microbatches per step; repeated module totals are full-step totals, not single-call totals.

env_notes.dense_linear_backward_owner_tags: enabled; profiling-only custom autograd wrapper with whole-backward and inner-matmul tags; no fp32 weight promotion
env_notes.moe_backend: MORI + AITER routed backward, padded local VJP, Triton SwiGLU backend
